evidence.fact: Immediately after submitting the exam, students see a competency breakdown that highlights weak areas and provides a study tip for each flagged competency.
evidence.user_story_span: restrict exams to one or more cohorts

evidence.claim: The cohort is available for enrollment.
evidence.fact: Instructors can enroll students individually into cohorts.

evidence.claim: The system allows enrolling individual students.
evidence.fact: New learners sign up and personalize their profile with a picture, then see their total nuggets, achievement badges, and a visual radar of their skills.
The leaderboard shows cohort members ordered by nugget earnings for a chosen timeframe, and both students (via opt-out) and instructors (via disable) can hide rankings.
Students are positioned on a leaderboard within their cohort based on nuggets collected during a customizable window, and participation can be turned off by the student or the teacher.

evidence.claim: The system allows restricting exams to one or more cohorts.
evidence.fact: Instructors can form cohorts, enroll individual students into them, and restrict exam access to one or more specified cohorts.
evidence.user_story_span: restrict exams to one or more cohorts
evidence.fact_span: restrict exam access to one or more specified cohorts

evidence.fact: Nuggets accumulated by a student are stored in a wallet and can be used to purchase virtual rewards or instructor-defined institutional privileges from a store.

evidence.claim: The user has one or more cohorts.
evidence.fact: Students are positioned on a leaderboard within their cohort based on nuggets collected during a customizable window, and participation can be turned off by the student or the teacher.
